title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: A responsive portfolio website built with HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript, featuring GitHub API integration to dynamically display repositories and commit activity.

title: Housing Price Prediction Model
description: Developed a machine learning model using Python and scikit-learn to predict housing prices based on features like location, size, and amenities, achieving strong regression accuracy.

title: Algorithm Visualizer
description: An interactive web application that visualizes sorting and pathfinding algorithms such as QuickSort and Dijkstra’s algorithm with real-time animations.

title: Java Inventory Management System
description: A command-line inventory system built in Java using object-oriented design, supporting product tracking, stock updates, and basic reporting features.

title: Campus Event Finder App
description: A mobile-friendly web app that aggregates campus events, allowing users to browse, filter, and save events using a REST API and local storage.

title: Real-Time Chat Application
description: Built a real-time chat app using Node.js and WebSockets, supporting multiple chat rooms, live messaging, and user presence indicators.

title: Fitness Tracker Dashboard
description: A data visualization dashboard that tracks workout activity and health metrics, built with JavaScript and charting libraries to display trends over time.

title: Weather Data Explorer
description: A web tool that fetches and visualizes historical weather data using public APIs, allowing users to explore temperature and precipitation trends.

title: Task Management CLI Tool
description: A lightweight command-line task manager written in Python, enabling users to create, update, and organize tasks with persistent local storage.

title: Simple E-commerce Backend
description: Designed a RESTful API using Express.js for an e-commerce platform, handling product listings, user authentication, and order processing.

title: Image Gallery Web App
description: A responsive image gallery built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, featuring grid layouts, lightbox previews, and lazy loading for performance.

title: Basic CPU Scheduling Simulator
description: A simulation tool that demonstrates CPU scheduling algorithms like FCFS and Round Robin, helping visualize process execution and wait times.
